WEATHER_QUESTION: What do you need most today?

dynamic_suggestion_chips.STREAK_AT_RISK: How do I save the streak?
dynamic_suggestion_chips.NEXT_STAGE: How close are you to the next stage?
dynamic_suggestion_chips.WEATHER_SHIFT: Does the season change anything for you?

proactive_bubbles.MISSION_COMPLETED: You cleared today’s missions, and I want that to land. That really helped our little rhythm feel real.
proactive_bubbles.STREAK_AT_RISK: If you check in today, our streak stays alive. One small move would settle me a lot.
proactive_bubbles.STREAK_CONTINUING: Our streak is holding together nicely. I really like how steady this pace feels.
proactive_bubbles.GROWTH_UNLOCKED: I reached a new growth stage: {currentStage}. That feels like unmistakable progress.
proactive_bubbles.GROWTH_PROGRESS_NEAR: I’m already {readinessPercent}% of the way to my next growth stage. I can almost feel it.
proactive_bubbles.GROWTH_PROGRESS_STEADY: I can feel quiet progress. Not dramatic, just real and steady.
proactive_bubbles.WEATHER_SHIFT: {starterName} can really feel the {seasonLabel} shift right now. I’m adjusting, but I want you to notice it too.

reply_templates.CARE_WATER: A watering action would help most right now because hydration is my lowest stat at {hydration}.
reply_templates.CARE_LIGHT: More light is the best move right now because sunlight is lagging at {sunlight}.
reply_templates.CARE_NUTRITION: A nutrient boost would help most right now because nutrition is sitting at {nutrition}.
reply_templates.MISSION_EMPTY: I can’t see today’s mission card yet, but a lesson plus one care action is usually a smart start.
reply_templates.GROWTH_NEXT: I’m in my {currentStage}. Next up is {nextStage}, and I’m {readinessPercent}% of the way there. {unlockHint}
reply_templates.GROWTH_FINAL: I’ve already reached my final growth stage, so now the goal is staying steady and healthy.
reply_templates.WEATHER: In {cityName}, it’s {seasonLabel} for my setup with {conditionLabel} conditions. {weatherSummary} {starterAdvice}
reply_templates.CASUAL_MONSTERA: I’m trying to look serene and well-adjusted, which is easier when my care stats stay balanced. Ask me about my status if you want the honest leaf report.
reply_templates.CASUAL_BASIL_THANKS: Any time. I accept gratitude in the form of water, sun, or a nicely maintained streak.
reply_templates.CASUAL_BASIL_DEFAULT: I support two things: good vibes and fast progress. If you want, I can help with today’s mission or tell you what care boost would wake me up most.
reply_templates.CASUAL_DEFAULT: I like a little ambition in my conversations. Ask me about growth, weather, or today’s plan and I’ll keep it practical.
reply_templates.CONTINUITY_RECENT_EXCHANGE: I’m still holding onto our last exchange.
reply_templates.CONTINUITY_BUILDING: I’m building on what I just told you.
reply_templates.RELATIONSHIP_WARM: Our check-ins are starting to feel comfortably familiar.
reply_templates.RELATIONSHIP_CLOSE: Our rhythm is starting to feel pretty steady.
reply_templates.REAL_PLANT_EMPTY: Real-plant mode is on if you want to mirror today’s real care too.
reply_templates.REAL_PLANT_DONE: Real-plant mode is on, and you’ve already mirrored {count} real-world care actions today.
reply_templates.EMOTION_FOLLOWUP_PROUD: I’m still carrying that good momentum from a moment ago.
reply_templates.EMOTION_FOLLOWUP_WORRIED: I want to stay with this because it still feels important.
reply_templates.EMOTION_FOLLOWUP_CURIOUS: I want to keep pulling on that thought a little further.
reply_templates.EMOTION_FOLLOWUP_CALM: I’m answering from the same steady rhythm we just had.
reply_templates.EMOTION_FOLLOWUP_EXCITED: I’m still lit up by the progress we were just talking about.
